meaning: n.灾难,大洪水,地震,(社会政治的)大变动
examples: Cataclysm is likely to be the biggest release of next year.
The immediate cause for this cataclysm was the recession.
Some warned of a housing bubble, but almost none foresaw the resulting cataclysm.
For them the Great Recession is not a cute aphorism but a major cataclysm.
What we all know is that this country has been through the worst economic cataclysm of our lifetimes.
